response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech-specific background, or proven track record in scaling engineering teams to the required size (10+ to 30+). His contributions to agentic workflows and event-driven architectures are relevant but not clearly tied to regulated, high-stakes production environments like fintech.
strengths: Diverse technical background with hands-on experience in event-driven architectures, microservices, and real-time systems (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby).
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq, agentic workflows).
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating technical depth and problem-solving skills.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance).
Agentic AI experience appears more prototypical (e.g., GISCollective) rather than production-grade in regulated environments.
